cells.rationale: Contract-shaped versioned committed-dataset schema and write-once/--force guard matrix warrant xhigh depth, but the spec templates verbatim on existing committed-artifact invariants so sonnet suffices.
Mechanical end-to-end verb deletion, cross-reference scrub, and agent reframe on a clear multi-file path guarded by consistency tests.

Event-sourcing rewinding migration with a subtle re-fold-determinism correctness invariant (wipe exactly the deterministic-replayed projections, historical folds must not throw) cascading across many consumers is a nameable intelligence-bound reason.

Novel design of an honest-statistics grading skill (Wilson CIs, calibration, Simpson's-trap guards), blinded auditor fan-out, set-difference watermark, and corpus-as-injection hardening is design- and correctness-bound work.
